target_market_label.zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国（ESMA / DCD）
target_market_label.zht: 阿拉伯聯合酋長國（ESMA / DCD）

title.zh: 中国电池储能系统进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電池儲能系統進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against UAE conformity assessment, IEC battery and energy-storage standards, UN 38.3 transport, Dubai Civil Defence fire-safety review, and EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电池储能系统文件与阿联酋合格评定、IEC电池及储能标准、UN 38.3运输、迪拜民防消防安全审查和EMC要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電池儲能系統文件與阿聯酋合格評定、IEC電池及儲能標準、UN 38.3運輸、杜拜民防消防安全審查和EMC要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ESMA or MoIAT scope determination, Dubai Civil Defence approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-connection approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current UAE federal, emirate-level civil-defence, utility, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ESMA或MoIAT适用范围裁定、迪拜民防批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿联酋联邦、酋长国级民防、公用事业、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ESMA或MoIAT適用範圍裁定、杜拜民防批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋聯邦、酋長國級民防、公用事業、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to the UAE, do not assume one blanket mandatory whole-unit ESMA certificate covers every stationary energy-storage project. The defensible starting point is to confirm MoIAT / former ESMA regulated-product scope for the battery, inverter, control, charger, and electrical subassemblies; prepare IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence where specified; complete UN 38.3 for lithium-battery transport; and handle Dubai Civil Defence or other emirate fire-safety and installation review for the site.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿联酋时，不应假定存在一个覆盖所有固定式储能项目的强制整机ESMA证书。稳妥的起点是核实电池、逆变器、控制、充电器及电气子组件是否落入MoIAT/原ESMA受管产品范围；按项目要求准备IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据；完成锂电池运输UN 38.3；并处理迪拜民防或其他酋长国针对现场的消防安全和安装审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口阿聯酋時，不應假定存在一個覆蓋所有固定式儲能項目的強制整機ESMA證書。穩妥的起點是核實電池、逆變器、控制、充電器及電氣子組件是否落入MoIAT/原ESMA受管產品範圍；按項目要求準備IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據；完成鋰電池運輸UN 38.3；並處理杜拜民防或其他酋長國針對現場的消防安全和安裝審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
